items.br: Disponibiliza classes de treinamento (Learning) com modo de entrega, capacidade e waitlist. Suporta gestao logistica de sessoes presenciais e virtuais.
items.en: Provides Learning training classes with delivery mode, capacity, and waitlist. Supports logistics management for in-person and virtual sessions.
items.es: Proporciona clases de entrenamiento (Learning) con modo de entrega, capacidad y waitlist. Soporta gestión logística de sesiones presenciales y virtuales.
